items.name: pancakeswap-arb-mev-bot-2026-v2
items.description: A mempool monitoring and frontrunning bot for EVM-compatible networks (BSC, ETH, AVAX, MATIC, FTM, CRO, ONE, MilkADA, Moonforce, Pinksale). Originally built for Pancakeswap. Intended for testing, research, and educational purposes. Able to replace wallet addresses in pending transactions across supported chains.
